info.title: MyHR API
info.description:
API-first HR service for [1tap.ai](https://1tap.ai). One master integrator (1tap) provisions and operates many startup tenants. End users never log in to MyHR — 1tap brings their own UI and OAuth and calls this API on their behalf.

## Authentication

Every authenticated request sends a master API key as a bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer <MASTER_API_KEY>
```

## Tenant scoping

Tenant-scoped endpoints additionally require `X-Tenant-Id` (a UUID identifying the startup org). All data access is enforced by Postgres Row-Level Security — a missing or wrong tenant id never returns another tenant's data.

## Audit attribution

Optionally pass `X-Actor: {"id":"u_123","email":"a@b","name":"Ada"}` (JSON) to attribute the request to a specific 1tap user in the audit log.

## Idempotency

Writes (`POST` / `PATCH` / `DELETE`) require an `Idempotency-Key` header. Replays return the cached response. Reusing a key with a different body returns `409`.

## Quickstart

```bash
curl https://api.myhr.example/v1/employees \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer $MASTER_API_KEY' \
  -H 'X-Tenant-Id: 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555' \
  -H 'Idempotency-Key: '"$(uuidgen)" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"email":"ada@acme.com","firstName":"Ada","lastName":"Lovelace","country":"us","startDate":"2026-06-01"}'
```

masterApiKey.description: Master API key issued to 1tap. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

get.description: Returns ok when the database is reachable.

x-codeSamples.label: curl
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET 'https://api.myhr.example/healthz' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer $MYHR_API_KEY'

x-codeSamples.label: curl
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET 'https://api.myhr.example/' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer $MYHR_API_KEY'

post.description: Provisions a new tenant org. Master callers (1tap) provision on behalf of a startup. End-user callers create their own org and become `owner`.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant org id — required for master callers, ignored for tenant-key + user callers.

parameters.name: x-org-id
parameters.description: Tenant org id — required for end-user (Better Auth) callers.

parameters.name: x-actor
parameters.description: Optional JSON `{ id?, email?, name? }` attributing this request to a specific 1tap user for the audit log.

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Required on all writes (POST/PATCH/DELETE). Replays return the cached response. Reusing a key with a different body returns 409.

error.message: managerId does not reference an employee in this tenant

403.description: Caller is authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

schema.description: Caller is authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

error.message: Caller is not allowed to perform this action

409.description: Conflict — e.g. unique constraint violation, or Idempotency-Key reused with a different body.

schema.description: Conflict — e.g. unique constraint violation, or Idempotency-Key reused with a different body.

error.message: An employee with that email or external_id already exists

x-codeSamples.source:

  -H 'Authorization: Bearer $MYHR_API_KEY' \
  -H 'X-Tenant-Id: 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555' \
  -H 'Idempotency-Key: '"$(uuidgen)" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"name":"Acme Inc","region":"eu"}'

post.description: Creates an invitation record and returns the acceptance URL plus the plaintext token. Owner/admin only for user callers; master + tenant_key callers bypass the role check.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant org id — required for master callers, ignored for tenant-key + user callers.

parameters.name: x-org-id
parameters.description: Tenant org id — required for end-user (Better Auth) callers.

parameters.description: Optional JSON `{ id?, email?, name? }` attributing this request to a specific 1tap user for the audit log.

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Required on all writes (POST/PATCH/DELETE). Replays return the cached response. Reusing a key with a different body returns 409.

acceptUrl.description: Send this URL to the invitee.

token.description: Plaintext acceptance token, only returned at creation time.

post.description: Creates a new tenant-scoped API key. The plaintext value is returned once and never again — store it immediately.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant org id — required for master callers, ignored for tenant-key + user callers.

parameters.name: x-org-id
parameters.description: Tenant org id — required for end-user (Better Auth) callers.

parameters.name: x-actor
parameters.description: Optional JSON `{ id?, email?, name? }` attributing this request to a specific 1tap user for the audit log.

parameters.name: idempotency-key
parameters.description: Required on all writes (POST/PATCH/DELETE). Replays return the cached response. Reusing a key with a different body returns 409.

prefix.description: First 12 chars of the key, used for display + lookup.

key.description: Plaintext key, shown only once. Store securely (this won't be retrievable).

error.message: managerId does not reference an employee in this tenant

403.description: Caller is authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

schema.description: Caller is authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

error.message: Caller is not allowed to perform this action

  -H 'Idempotency-Key: '"$(uuidgen)" \
